title: ANGER MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: TERAS COUNSELING INC ANGER MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual anger management sessions. Does not offer group sessions. Each person's anger management plan is individualized to their unique situation. The number of sessions may vary but a minimum of 12 sessions is recommended. 3945 SE Hawthorne Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Individuals who have alleged, adjucated, pending, or other history of domestic violence are ineligible. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-9pm, Saturday by appointment only Email (503) 719-5250 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 719-5250 FAX (503) 715-5672 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: Varies by program. Accepts OHP. Cash payment options are available. DOCUMENTS: Contact information for primary care physician, referral sources, behavioral health provider, other treatment services, an all other individuals involved in the patient's treatment plan LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8:45pm, Saturday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Available by TriMet bus lines 14 and 75 Services: Anger Management Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PERPETRATOR INTERVENTION PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT AND DUII SERVICES REHABILITATION AND EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TERAS COUNSELING INC
